languages.text: "Я и мои коллеги почтем за честь провести над вами ритуал имплантации".

traits.locale_text: "Я и мои коллеги почтём за честь провести над вами ритуал имплантации".

languages.text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."
languages.original_text: "Я и мои коллеги почтем за честь провести над вами ритуал имплантации".

traits.locale_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."
"My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."
"My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

languages.text: 「私の同僚たちと私は、あなたに植込みの儀式を行うことを光栄に思います」
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

languages.text: "Meslektaşlarım ve ben, implantasyon ayinini uygulamaktan onur duyarız."
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşlarım ve ben, implantasyon ayinini uygulamaktan onur duyarız."

languages.text: “能为您施行植入圣礼，我等倍感殊荣。”
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

traits.locale_text: “能为您施行植入圣礼，我等倍感殊荣。”

languages.text: "Es wäre meinen Kollegen und mir eine Ehre, das Implantationsritual bei Euch auszuführen."
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

traits.locale_text: "Es wäre meinen Kollegen und mir eine Ehre, das Implantationsritual bei Euch auszuführen."

languages.text: « Mes collègues et moi-même serions honorés de réaliser le rituel d'implantation sur vous. »
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

traits.locale_text: « Mes collègues et moi-même serions honorés de réaliser le rituel d'implantation sur vous. »

languages.text: «Mis colegas y yo nos sentiríamos honrados de celebrar el ritual de implantación sobre usted».
languages.original_text: "My colleagues and I would be honoured to perform the implantation ritual on you."

traits.locale_text: «Mis colegas y yo nos sentiríamos honrados de celebrar el ritual de implantación sobre usted».
